HERO_NOT_RELEASED.title: {hero} is not yet released
HERO_NOT_RELEASED.description: Statistics will be available once this hero is released and players have had time to collect data.

RECENTLY_RELEASED.title: {hero} was recently released
RECENTLY_RELEASED.description: We're still collecting data for this hero. Stats will be available soon as more matches are played.

REGION_NOT_SUPPORTED.title: Stats unavailable for this region
REGION_NOT_SUPPORTED.description: Statistics for {hero} are not collected in the selected region.

FILTER_EXCLUDES_ALL_DATA.title: No data for this filter
FILTER_EXCLUDES_ALL_DATA.description: The current filter combination has no matching data for {hero}. Try adjusting your filters.

ETL_PIPELINE_HALTED.title: Data pipeline paused
ETL_PIPELINE_HALTED.description: The data pipeline for this statistic is currently halted. We're working on restoring it.
